register.termsAndConditions: I agree to the terms and conditions

logout.message: Are you sure you want to sign out?
logout.thisDevice: Sign out from this device only

forgotPassword.userNotFound: No account found with this email
forgotPassword.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.differentFromOld: Must be different from previous password

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.

course.alreadyEnrolled: You are already enrolled in this course
course.enrollmentClosed: Enrollment is closed for this course

ratings.mustCompleteToRate: Complete the course to rate it

completion.helpOthers: Help others by sharing your experience

quiz.cannotChangeAnswers: You cannot change your answers after submitting.

profile.title: User Profile
profile.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete your account?

404.title: Page Not Found
404.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
404.suggestion: Check the URL or go back to the homepage.

403.title: Access Denied
403.message: You don't have permission to access this page.
403.suggestion: Contact your administrator if you believe this is an error.

401.title: Authentication Required
401.message: Please log in to access this page.
401.suggestion: Sign in with your account credentials.

500.title: Server Error
500.message: Something went wrong on our end.
500.suggestion: Please try again later or contact support.

503.title: Service Unavailable
503.suggestion: We're working on it. Please check back soon.
